payload.text:
📖 *HabitDash — Commands*

/start — Open the dashboard
/help — Show this help
/add — Create a new habit
/list — Show all your habits
/check — Mark a habit done for today
/stats — Today's progress + longest streak

Just type one of the commands above to get started.

name: unknown command triggers a friendly fallback

payload.text:
Unknown command: /nope
🤔 That command isn't recognized. Type /help to see the full list of available commands.

name: unknown command surfaces the bad command name so users spot typos

payload.text:
Unknown command: /addd
🤔 That command isn't recognized. Type /help to see the full list of available commands.

name: non-command text is ignored (HabitDash is button-driven)
